Statement of Feelings Rendered
#Description of FeelingValue
01
The Moment I First Saw You
29th June. A hot summer afternoon. The temperature was high, we were both sweating — and yet I didn't notice the heat. I didn't notice the crowd. All I could see was you. My beautiful Niku. My eyes couldn't stop. They never got tired. Even now, they still crave to see you again.
∞ Heartbeats
02
When You Held My Arm 🥹
For everyone else it might have seemed ordinary. But for me — it felt like the safest place in the world. And then I held your hand. In that moment, I silently wished time would stop. Right there. With you.
1 Lifetime of Safety
03
Every Picture I Ever Clicked of You
Every picture looked beautiful because you were in it. But the truth is — no camera could ever capture how beautiful you looked standing right in front of me. No lens was ever built for that.
Uncountable Frames
04
When Your Feet Touched Mine 🥹🫠
I know it may sound a little cringe. Maybe you'll even smile while reading this. But to me, that tiny moment was incredibly pure. It wasn't about touching. It was about feeling close to you. It became one of my favorite memories. And today — I miss even that little moment.
My Favorite Memory
05
The Way You Talk. The Way You Smile.
The way you talk to me, the way you smile — I am completely obsessed with that. I want to be obsessed. Your smile is not something I can explain. It just does something to me that nothing else ever has.
Daily Obsession
06
My Heart Refusing to Say Goodbye
My heart simply didn't want to leave you. I didn't care about timing. I didn't think about how I'd return home. I didn't calculate anything. The only thing I knew — I wanted to stay near you. To breathe the same air. To spend a few more moments with the person who had already become so precious to me.
All the Time
07
What You Are to Me
My comfort. My peace. My safe place. My favorite person. My home. You make my inner child smile again — with a happiness I have never experienced before. You have slowly become my everything. Without even realizing it.
Everything
08
My Promise to You
I know I'm not perfect. But every single day, I'll keep trying to become someone who deserves you — someone who protects your peace, respects your heart, and makes you smile. Because seeing you happy has slowly become my own happiness.
Every Single Day
09
Something I've Never Told Anyone
This is the first time in my life I've written my heart like this for someone. I've never stayed awake thinking about someone this much. I've never missed someone like this. Trust me — this has never happened before. You are my first in so many beautiful ways.
One & Only

From His Heart — Full Statement

To my beautiful Niku,

The smile I live for 🌻

The 29th of June. A day I will never forget — not simply because it was your birthday, but because it was the day I met the most beautiful person I have ever known. Even today, whenever I close my eyes, every single moment of that afternoon plays in my heart like a movie. The heat, the crowd — and yet none of it mattered. Because all I could see was you.

The way you looked that day — no camera could have captured it. No picture ever did you justice. You are even more beautiful in real life. The way you smile, the way you look at me, the way you talk — everything about you stayed with me long after we said goodbye. Honestly, I could keep looking at you for hours, and my eyes would still never feel satisfied. Every time I see you, it feels like seeing you for the very first time, all over again.

When you held my arm — I don't think you'll ever fully understand what that small moment did to me. For everyone else, it might have been something ordinary. But for me, it felt like the safest place in the world. When I held your hand, I silently wished that time would stop. Right there. With you.

My everything 🌹

Sitting with you, clicking your pictures, walking with you — not because I had a plan, but because my heart wasn't ready to say goodbye. And when your feet touched mine — I know it may sound a little cringe, maybe you'll even smile while reading this — but to me, that tiny moment was incredibly pure. It wasn't about touching. It was about feeling close to you. It became one of my favorite memories. And today, I miss even that little moment.

I know I'm not the most handsome guy. I know I'm not perfect. Maybe there are people better than me. But one thing I can promise you — no one will ever love you with the honesty, loyalty, respect, and care that I want to give you. I'll keep trying every single day to become someone who makes you feel safe, loved, and genuinely happy.

Because slowly, without either of us realizing it — you became my comfort. My peace. My favorite person. My home. You make my inner child smile again. With you, even silence feels beautiful. You are no longer just someone I love. You are becoming my everything.

And now let me say something I'm a little afraid to say. I know real love is unconditional. I know I can never force you to stay. But if I'm being completely honest — I want you. Not just for today. Not just for this moment. I want a future with you. The thought of losing you scares me, because you have become so precious to me.

So if there's ever anything that bothers you — if I ever make a mistake — please don't keep it inside. Talk to me. Let's solve it together. Don't silently distance yourself. Be honest with me. I promise I will never judge you. I will always listen. I will always respect your feelings. No matter what happens, you will always be a beautiful soul in my eyes.

Relationships don't survive because people are perfect. They survive because two people choose honesty, communication, patience, and each other. And that's exactly what I want with you — at the end of every day, through every smile, every challenge, and every dream.

I'll choose you. Again. And again. And again.

This is the first time in my life I have written my heart like this for someone. I have never stayed awake thinking about someone this much. I have never missed someone like this. I have never craved to see someone, to hear their voice, to simply sit beside them. You are my first in so many beautiful ways.

Thank you for making my heart feel something it had never felt before.

"No matter where life takes us, I just hope one day I can look back and say —
the best decision I ever made was loving you."

Forever grateful that 29th June wasn't just your birthday...
it became the day my heart found its home. 🫂❤️

Divya Swarup (Your GUGUU) ❤️
Authorized Signature — The One Who Loves You Most
♥

She makes every place look beautiful 🌸
My queen, always ✨

I love you so, so, so much, my beautiful Niku.  ·  Thank you for being my home.
